title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host talks about India's different customs and traditions. He explains how people celebrate in various states. Learn about India's rich cultural diversity. Enjoy the journey.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav learns that Reet has brought his mother to their home. Upon arriving, he confronts Reet about her decision to do so without consulting him.

title: Vasudha
desc: Devansh thanks Vasudha for saving Chandrika and returns her earrings. Later, he and Avinash escort Vasudha home from the hospital.

title: Meet
desc: Babita worries about Meet's ability to take care of herself. Later, she scolds Meet for being careless with Duggu meanwhile Anubha reassures Meet about her future.

title: Meet
desc: Babita urges Meet to quit the job, but he eventually agrees to stay. Later, Meet faces danger at the ashram meanwhile she bravely defends herself before help arrives.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: The result for the cooking competition is announced and Mehak manages to get to the next round. While Mehak is happy about her success, Shaurya meets her.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Durga pretends that Guddan has run away but meanwhile, Guddan is approached by leering drunk men. However, AJ manages to find her just in time.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.
